instructions: This repository is winghostty, a Windows-focused Ghostty fork. Review against amanthanvi/winghostty, not ghostty-org/ghostty. Do not suggest reintroducing the removed macos/ Xcode app or src/apprt/gtk runtime. Prefer minimal Zig changes and targeted zig build test -Dtest-filter validation.

rules.rule: Search events that cross thread or mailbox boundaries must carry and validate the current search generation before mutating renderer or UI state.
Win32 chrome or pane layout changes must explicitly invalidate affected child HWND or content regions; avoid full-window invalidation unless the repaint scope is truly unknown.
Repository operations and review suggestions must target amanthanvi/winghostty and must not assume upstream ghostty-org/ghostty publishing paths.
